TextView.android:text:
Meditation And Mindfulness

1. Start with Deep Breathing
Take slow, deep breaths to calm your mind.

2. Find a Quiet Space
Choose a peaceful place free from distractions.

3. Focus on the Present
Let go of past worries and future stress.

4. Be Kind to Your Mind
Do not judge your thoughts—just observe them.

5. Start Small
Even 5–10 minutes a day can make a difference.

6. Use Guided Meditation
Listen to calming audio if you're a beginner.

7. Sit Comfortably
Relax your body while keeping your back straight.

8. Practice Daily
Consistency helps build a strong habit.

9. Let Thoughts Pass
Allow thoughts to come and go without attachment.

10. End with Gratitude
Take a moment to appreciate yourself and your day.
